title: Tic Tac Toe
description: Classic Tic Tac Toe game! Play against the computer or a friend. Get three in a row to win!
controls: Click on any empty cell to place your mark (X or O). Get three in a row to win!

title: Memory Match
description: Test your memory by matching pairs of cards. Flip cards and find matching pairs!
controls: Click on cards to flip them. Find matching pairs to remove them!

title: Snake Game
description: Control the snake and eat food to grow longer! Avoid hitting the walls or your own tail.
controls: Use arrow keys or WASD to control the snake. Eat food to grow!

title: Whack-a-Mole
description: Whack the moles as they pop up! Test your reaction speed!
controls: Click on the moles as fast as you can when they appear!

title: Color Matching
description: Match colors and test your reflexes! Tap to jump through matching colored obstacles.
controls: Click to jump. Only pass through obstacles that match your color!

title: Catch Falling Objects
description: Move your basket to catch falling objects! Don't let them hit the ground!
controls: Use arrow keys or mouse to move the basket left and right!

title: Jigsaw Puzzle
description: Solve beautiful jigsaw puzzles with varying difficulty levels!
controls: Drag and drop puzzle pieces to their correct positions!

title: Hangman
description: Classic word guessing game! Guess letters to reveal the hidden word!
controls: Click on letters to guess the word before running out of tries!

title: Dot & Boxes
description: Connect dots to form boxes! The player with the most boxes wins!
controls: Click on lines between dots to draw them. Complete a box to claim it!

title: Simon Says
description: Remember and repeat the color sequence! Watch and repeat the pattern!
controls: Watch the sequence, then click colors in the same order!

title: Fruit Ninja
description: Slice fruits with your blade! Avoid bombs and score high!
controls: Swipe or drag mouse to slice fruits. Avoid bombs!

title: Flappy Bird
description: Navigate through pipes by flapping! How far can you go?
controls: Click or press SPACE to flap. Avoid the pipes!

title: Angry Birds
description: Launch birds to destroy pig structures! Physics-based fun!
controls: Drag and release to launch birds at the pigs!

title: Candy Crush
description: Match candies to clear levels! Sweet puzzle adventure!
controls: Swap adjacent candies to match 3 or more!

title: Crossy Road
description: Cross roads, rivers and train tracks! Don't get hit!
controls: Click or tap to move forward. Avoid obstacles!

title: Subway Surfers
description: Run through subway tracks, dodge trains, collect coins!
controls: Swipe to move left/right, jump and roll!

title: Temple Run
description: Run through ancient temples! Avoid obstacles and collect gems!
controls: Swipe to turn, jump and slide!

title: Geometry Dash
description: Jump and fly through danger! Rhythm-based action!
controls: Click or press SPACE to jump. Timing is everything!

title: Among Us
description: Find the impostor or complete tasks! Social deduction game!
controls: Move with WASD, complete tasks or eliminate crewmates!

title: Minecraft Classic
description: Build and explore in this blocky world! Creative sandbox!
controls: WASD to move, click to place/break blocks!

title: Slither.io
description: Grow your snake by eating orbs! Avoid other snakes!
controls: Move mouse to control snake. Click to boost!

title: Agar.io
description: Eat smaller cells to grow! Avoid bigger players!
controls: Move mouse to control cell. Split with SPACE!

title: Bubble Shooter
description: Match and pop bubbles! Clear all bubbles to win!
controls: Aim and click to shoot bubbles. Match 3 or more!

title: Sudoku
description: Fill the grid with numbers! Logic puzzle classic!
controls: Click cell and type number 1-9. No repeats in row/column/box!

title: Mahjong
description: Match tiles to clear the board! Classic tile matching!
controls: Click on matching free tiles to remove them!

title: Solitaire
description: Classic card game! Arrange cards by suit from Ace to King!
controls: Drag cards to build foundations in order!

title: Minesweeper
description: Find all mines without stepping on them! Use numbers as clues!
controls: Click to reveal, right-click to flag mines!

description: Combine tiles to reach 2048! Addictive number puzzle!
controls: Use arrow keys to slide tiles. Same numbers merge!

title: Tetris
description: Classic block stacking game! Clear lines to score!
controls: Arrow keys to move and rotate. Clear horizontal lines!

title: Connect Four
description: Drop discs to connect four in a row! Classic strategy game!
controls: Click column to drop disc. Connect 4 horizontally, vertically or diagonally!

title: Checkers
description: Classic board game! Jump over opponent's pieces to win!
controls: Click piece to select, click valid square to move!

title: Ludo
description: Roll dice and race your tokens home! Family board game!
controls: Click to roll dice, click token to move!

title: Car Racing
description: Race super cars on stunt tracks! High speed action!
controls: Arrow keys to drive, SPACE for handbrake!

title: Moto X3M
description: Race motorcycles through crazy obstacles! Extreme stunts!
controls: Arrow keys to drive and balance!

title: Happy Wheels
description: Ragdoll physics racing! Reach the finish in one piece!
controls: Arrow keys to move, SPACE to jump, CTRL to action!

title: Paper.io
description: Capture territory by drawing lines! Don't get hit!
controls: WASD or arrow keys to move. Create closed shapes!

title: Hole.io
description: Control a black hole! Swallow everything in the city!
controls: Move mouse to control hole. Eat smaller objects!

title: Soccer Stars
description: Flick your players to score goals! Table soccer fun!
controls: Click and drag to aim, release to shoot!

title: Basketball Shots
description: Score baskets in this fun basketball game!
controls: Aim and shoot to score points!

title: Bowling
description: Knock down all the pins! Classic bowling game!
controls: Aim and throw the ball to knock down pins!

title: 8 Ball Pool
description: Play pool against players worldwide! Aim and pot balls!
controls: Aim with mouse, adjust power and shoot!

title: Darts
description: Hit the bullseye! Precision dart throwing game!
controls: Aim and throw darts at the target!

title: Piano Tiles
description: Tap the black tiles to play music! Rhythm game!
controls: Click on black tiles as they fall. Don't miss any!

title: Bouncing Ball
description: Guide the ball through obstacles! Bounce and survive!
controls: Click to change direction. Avoid obstacles!

title: Stack
description: Stack blocks as high as you can! Perfect timing game!
controls: Click to drop blocks. Align perfectly for bonus!

title: Water Sort Puzzle
description: Sort colored water into tubes! Brain teaser puzzle!
controls: Click to pour water between tubes. Sort all colors!

title: Word Search
description: Find hidden words in the grid! Word puzzle classic!
controls: Click and drag to select words in the puzzle!

title: Crossword
description: Fill in the crossword puzzle! Test your vocabulary!
controls: Click cells and type letters to complete words!

title: Ultimate Tic Tac Toe
description: 9 boards in one! Strategic twist on classic game!
controls: Win small boards to claim big squares!

title: Sliding Puzzle
description: Slide tiles to complete the image! Classic puzzle!
controls: Click adjacent tiles to slide them into empty space!

title: Reflex Test
description: Test your reaction time! How fast can you click?
controls: Click when the screen turns green as fast as you can!
